visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a beige face mask and a grey knit vest over a black long-sleeved shirt stands in a modern kitchen, gesturing enthusiastically while looking into the camera. The background features dark grey cabinetry and a white countertop with kitchen essentials. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a makeup artist's hands using a brush on a model's face in a well-lit studio setting, with cosmetic bottles visible on a white table in the foreground. (3) The first woman reappears holding a black, sleek Medicube beauty device, pointing at its head which emits a red light; she then shows a second woman using the device on her jawline. (4) The presenter holds a light-blue tub of Torriden cotton pads, with a close-up shot highlighting the product text and her manicured nails. (5) She displays a small, flat, white UV nail lamp, demonstrating its portability, followed by a close-up of a hand with glossy cat-eye style nails. (6) The woman waves at the camera before slowly crouching down out of frame in a playful exit.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: (用完像換一張臉?!) [Slogan]: 密. (2) [Slogan]: 化妝師 近期熱愛三選. (3) [Slogan]: 化妝師 近期熱愛三選 第二集 Doris. (4) [Logo]: @Doris0505. (5) [Variety]: (一號推坑受災戶) [Subtitle]: 她推坑了我買超多隻 chanel 的唇釉 真的超級好用. (6) [Slogan]: Medicube/age-R Booster Pro [Subtitle]: 首先第一個 原瑛代言的美容儀 [Variety]: 張員瑛代言的美容儀. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為早上幫大家化妝 就是會遇到水腫的問題 [Variety]: (鏡頭後那位先承認). (8) [Variety]: (彈力輪廓護理) [Subtitle]: 這個時候你就可以 把這個紅色開起來 然後就直接電. (9) [Subtitle]: 水腫效果就會差很多對不對 就是大概一分鐘 就會立刻消了. (10) [Variety]: (這時直接整容了吧?) [Subtitle]: 不小心會電太瘦 真的臉會變太瘦. (11) [Subtitle]: 我很喜歡這個不小心 這是不是韓國才買得到? 還是台灣現在買得到?. (12) [Subtitle]: 台灣也有 台灣好像有代理商 喔~. (13) [Slogan]: Torriden/5D微分子玻尿酸多效保濕棉片 [Subtitle]: 近期第二樣 這個濕敷棉片. (14) [Subtitle]: 因為我是看到韓國的化妝師老師 然後她就說 上妝前都會先幫藝人濕敷. (15) [Variety]: (已經用到快見底) [Subtitle]: 敷完上妝比較貼 而且它很溫和. (16) [Subtitle]: 因為我的臉其實算敏感的人 所以我今天在敷的時候 我也覺得很舒服. (17) [Subtitle]: 第三個就是跟臉比較沒關係 我們延續上一集? 美甲的部分.... (18) [Slogan]: Homci / 光療系列 [Subtitle]: 愛用的光療. (19) [Subtitle]: 因為我看他們那個美甲 我就想說 挖也太厲害了吧?!. (20) [Variety]: 莫名的勝負慾(?) [Subtitle]: 我不能輸! 莫名地勝負慾?. (21) [Slogan]: 3COINS/UV-LED 凝膠美甲燈 [Subtitle]: 它就這樣子 然後你出門的時候 就只要帶這個 然後就可以這樣子. (22) [Variety]: 成品是好看的貓眼~ [Subtitle]: 貓眼好美 對阿 真的很好看耶. (23) [Subtitle]: 謝謝Doris~~~ 謝謝大家 [Variety]: (電梯下樓) Doris真的很強 [Slogan]: 自備升降舞台XDD.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main presenter, 1 makeup artist, 1 model, 1 additional hand model
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman in her 20s with long dark hair, wearing a beige face mask, a black long-sleeved shirt, and a grey knitted vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern kitchen with grey cabinets, white countertops, and kitchenware; a studio setting with a vanity and professional makeup kit.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A bright, energetic female voice speaks at a fast pace in Traditional Chinese, accompanied immediately by upbeat, medium-tempo synth-pop BGM. The tone is cheerful and engaging for a product introduction. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect sounds as visual titles transition, with the presenter's voice rising in pitch to show excitement about the first product. A low male voice is heard briefly off-camera, followed by light laughter. (3) A 'pop' SFX marks the introduction of the next cosmetic item. The BGM remains steady in the background, balanced well below the clear, professional articulation of the speaker. (4) Another 'pop' sound effect occurs as the third product is displayed. The off-camera male voice asks a question, prompting a playful giggle and increasing the positive emotional valence. (5) A final 'ding' and a cartoon-style 'whoosh' sound effect accompany the presenter's closing wave. The BGM and voice both conclude with a clean hard cut at the end of the timeline.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item Recommendation 1 -> Item Recommendation 2 -> Item Recommendation 3 -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle recommendation guide where the presenter shares three favorite beauty and grooming products from a professional makeup artist to inform and engage viewers interested in skincare and aesthetic maintenance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed presentation and positive testimonial of specific brand-name beauty products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High production value with social-media native editing, including dense text overlays and synchronized SFX to maximize audience engagement.
